case_number: constitutional petition is dismissed for non

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt: Petition.No.D-264 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For orders on M.A.No.1221/2021. 03. For hearing of main case. 18.01.2022 The petitioner by way of instant constitutional petition has sought for direction against the Revenue Officers for mutation of record of right. The issue of mutation of record of rights on the basis of inheritance being factual could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Be that as it may, none has put appearance on behalf of the petitioner; no intimation is furnished. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition is dismissed for non prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE.
